speaker: MATT
raw_text: I have a problem. Well, the problem is being a huge fan of the Witcher series for a long time. But yeah, that's our crazy Halloween-ness. We'll kick back here in just a minute to start the game and see what the wonders and dangers of Whitestone bring to Vox Machina. See you in just a second.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: But we skipped over my brother.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yes, indeed, because he vanished.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm the Dread Pirate Roberts, and I will most likely kill you in the morning-- or myself, because this is actually very sharp

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Do you have a comment about my perfect breasts and the shortage of them? Oh no! Careful, they are expensive.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Put that right there. Be careful, or there's actually stabbing in real life as opposed to just the game today. That'll be fun.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Liam doesn't know how to use knives or swords at all.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: He'll learn in time.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I'm dressed as Geralt of Rivia from the Witcher Series. Witcher 3, specifically, for this set of armor and outfit.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: How about that costume, ladies and gentlemen?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: He made all of that, by the way.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: He's a full-size action figure.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: He made that?

preceding_turns.speaker: ALL
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: What are you talking about?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: It's been fairly fresh since you even started the word of it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Well, we're going to learn!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: We're going to learn how to do it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: You wanna roleplay as the character you're dressed as. Yeah, it's hard. Don't do that.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I don't know, I feel as groggy as ever.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I don't think Scanlan's going to have a problem tonight.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Nope, this is how I imagine myself to be.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I am not going to look at that table at all tonight. All auditory for you three. Sorry.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: So we are-- wait, I forget.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You guys just now returned to the tavern.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: We're in the tavern. It's nighttime now?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It's starting to push later into the evening, now you guys have returned to the tavern.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: And as we returned to the tavern, did we see hustle and bustle of people rising up in rebellion, by any chance?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Not yet.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Overnight rebellion!

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Right now, I would say, based on preparation, the illusion-casting, conversation, you're looking at about 9:00, 9:30 in the evening.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: We haven't been to the Alcove or the barracks yet. The barracks are right against the castle, though.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Correct. You went to the Lady's Chamber and you spoke briefly with Keeper Yennen.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, with Keeper Yennen.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, let's go to the barracks.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: And you went to Beyond the Horizon, which was abandoned and partially collapsed.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: The barracks will be our last stop, I believe. Just because it's outside the city proper and it's up the hill. We might be able to stay at the Alcove, which is a magic shop that used to be in town. I know the proprietor, or I did, if he's still alive.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, let's go there.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Magic shop? Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: It was a magic shop, right?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, it's an arcane boutique, yes.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: An arcane boutique.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Are we tunneling there?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Are we going there now? Are we resting?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: We should rest.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: It's nighttime!

speaker: MATT
raw_text: It's been clarified by a couple of publications that have been sent to me when I questioned it.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Initiative?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Which, for the record Scanlan, as a fan mentioned to me this last week, your jack-of-all-trades ability as a bard that gives you plus two to all things you're not proficient in also adds to your initiative, technically. So you have a plus two to your initiative. I've had this brought up multiple times, if it's not true.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I know it's been brought up to me. I thought it was a hypothetical. Is it true?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: All right, a few hours of awkward conversation--

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Back and to the left.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Can we barricade the cellar somehow?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: That I can do. I'll do a Wall of Stone where I tunneled.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: We're very packed in. It's nice and cozy and warm.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It is, and you're surrounded by a number of bottles of wine--

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: And bear farts.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: And all the wine we stole. We stole a lot of wine.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Can we pop open a bottle of that wine?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: And try and relax?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, we can. I guess I'll allow it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Pop open the wine, share a bottle, and you all manage to find your way back to sleep. Who's taking watch now?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I'll go with Vax because I haven't been yet.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, so you two take the next watch.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I stay awake because I don't want them to be alone.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: (chuckles) All right, the three of you take this watch.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Half-elves, what what.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I go back to sleep.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Half-elves, what what.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Hello, my half-elven brothers.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Eventually, everyone's managed to gather your evening's rest. You come to consciousness, the cold morning greets you. No seeming further incident in the cellar during the evening.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Half-elves, what what.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Hello, my half-elven brothers.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right, a few hours of awkward conversation--

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: (shushing noises) Jeralt is speaking.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It's Geralt, thank you very much.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Sigil.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I haven't played that game, but is your name Solid Snake?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I will attack both of you.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Cue internet rage.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: (laughs) Oh man. All right, so after you guys take your watch, with seeming no incident, although some awkward conversation and a few jabs here and there. Final watch, who's taking that?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I've already watched.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I need to sleep. You need to sleep.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Fuck it, I'll do it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right, Grog is up.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Trinket stays awake with you, though.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: And Trinket does like staying awake with you, Grog. You both understand each other on a very feral and unintelligent level.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: We play hand slaps. (impact sound) Fuck. Claws catching every once in a while.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: All right, so. You finish your meal. Looking outside, what little bit of the windows you can see, since you covered them all with cloth, there's a little bit of daylight peeking through. It's soft daylight. It looks like, while it's not raining, there is still a cloud-covered sky. What is your plan of action?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: That mustache is getting very iffy.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I don't know what you're talking about.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Do we want some dried food rations?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Plus, there's probably dried food in this cellar.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I have a ton in the bag.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Can we do a check to see if there's any jerky or anything in the cellar? Did we already do that?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You guys looked through. You found some jerky, some dried food that's serviceable. Not the best, but serviceable. All right. Going forward, the sadistic tendencies that you've been exerting through a lot of this event are becoming harder and harder to control. Be mindful that when you strike to kill, you strike to torture before you do.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Whoa, that's so cool. I mean terrible.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Is he the only one that was affected this time, again?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yep. Everyone else rolled above a ten.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I have a very low wisdom, and I rolled really badly.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: "Simon was called away for a special project by the Briarwoods about six months ago. He told me to look over the store while he's gone. I'm sorry, we're mostly out of stock. We don't have much here at the moment."

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Yes, we're looking to buy a few things, and we were wondering-- actually, I used to do business with Simon. Is Simon around?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: "I don't know. He lives in the castle now. I mean, he would visit every week or so, but he hasn't been back in almost a month, and I'm a little worried."

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Yes, we're looking to buy a few things, and we were wondering-- actually, I used to do business with Simon. Is Simon around?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Simon was called away for a special project by the Briarwoods about six months ago. He told me to look over the store while he's gone. I'm sorry, we're mostly out of stock. We don't have much here at the moment."

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: He was called away on a special project? What sort of special project?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: She shakes her head and, "Foolish minds. The de Rolos have been dead for five years."

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "The Briarwoods are after you? I can't have you here! You'll bring them right to me!"

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Dear, the Briarwoods aren't after us. They're after everybody. What we need is a place to stay that we know is protected.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Make a persuasion roll.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: (growls) Eight is-- 16.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yes, big number. It's a very large die.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Can I try and pour on top of it?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I'd say no. Not at this point. You're the one that originally spurred her worry. She gives you a look. "Look, if I'm going to let you stay here, I need to know more about what it is that you're trying to accomplish here. Raising the symbol of the de Rolos? I've never seen any of you in the city before in my life."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Do you miss the de Rolos, dear?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Anything's better than this misery."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Well, we may know a couple de Rolos. We may know some. No big deal.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: It's true.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: "Follow me." She leads you to the back, and there's this very, very small room that looks like it used to be her father's room. It's dusty. Most of it has been untouched, except for the bed. She walks in. "This is all I have to offer. It's not much, but it's available."

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Immovable Rod, but yes.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Immovable Rod. That one. I was combining Bag of Holding and the Immovable Rod. Combining them.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: What's a movable rod?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Two greater healing and then another regular?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: One greater healing and two regular.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: It's like a ladder rung that you can put wherever you want and hang on it.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Did we already have one of those?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, we did.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: What happened to it?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Tiberius put it somewhere, and it never came back.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: He put it on the magic carpet?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: He might have. Tiberius had one. We didn't use it much.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: He's a mysterious motherfucker.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. She pushes it all towards you guys and says, "I have practically no one, and I can't be much help. I'm not a fighter."

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I'll take the rod.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I will make sure that you are compensated when this is over. Can we sleep here for the night?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: After about a minute or so of walking, you do see what looks to be a young man carrying a satchel over his shoulder. It looks like it's filled with a few small pieces of parchment that are rolled up. He's in a brisk walk somewhere.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: We have spoken to him. We will speak to him again today.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: His reach is far. He'd be the one to talk to. Well, don't stay here long. That will draw attention.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Also, we're going to have two more staying with us, if that's okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: One's a child, though. You won't even notice him.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Her shoulders slump a little bit. She's like, "All right. I'll prepare as best I can." And she starts reaching over and starts pulling these thin blankets out from a nearby cabinet and goes, "Well? Go!"

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Good day. Everyone, let's meet over at the Lady's Chamber once you're finished with your business.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right, now you guys.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm dragging you along by the scruff of the ear.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Pa, please!

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Shut up.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm tired.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to look for anybody walking by. Is there anyone nearby?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: "What, you think the folks who've taken their life to this point? You think that's the end, but no, not in this town. No, they just get right back up the next day. There is no way out."

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Can't fucking earn a living in this land. Come up from a mile out of town, been trying to grow fucking carrots for these fucking people. Can't earn a living!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "You're telling me. Ain't no living to be had in Whitestone these days. It's nothing but misery."

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Something's got to change here. I can't live. I can't give them what they want. I can't feed him. What are we fucking supposed to do here?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I haven't eaten in three days.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "That's the worst fucking part, is you know there's always an easy exit."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: What?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: "The uprising three years ago. Are you new to this fucking town?"

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: What?!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: How?! Is that even possible?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Deception, 15. Wait, or 29. It's a lot.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: What's your bonus?!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: No, it's 16 plus 13.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, so 29.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: That's 29. Sorry. It's a lot.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I was like, (explosion sounds). All right. Gives you a stern look. "Huh. Well, it'd be nice, for a change, that there'd be someone up to fucking fight for this shithole of a place."

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I start fake-weeping into my cup.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: He goes, "Oh no. No need for that. Going to make me lose my appetite. Hate the sound of a grown man crying. Chin up!" And he takes and flicks a coin at your face.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Ow, fuck!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Look, if what he's saying's true, and we've got some sort of savior making their way into town, well. Let's hope they're at least a little more prepared than the last ones."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: The last ones?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: "Well, in a similar fashion, we had a number of fed-up individuals decide to finally raise some sort of aggressive act against the castle and attempt to storm it by force. We figured we had the numbers. There are many dangers in that castle that go beyond what we were prepared for. As such, the few that survived, well. They met the fate most do at the Sun Tree these days. So we've been remiss to put ourselves in a similar position for many years now. To make matters worse, our informant within the castle has gone silent these past few weeks. We have no idea of the progression of the Briarwoods' plot."

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: That could be inferred.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Well, I have spoken privately with a number of the remaining community leaders of our town, and they are unconvinced. Understand, this isn't the first time an insurrection has been attempted, and much sorrow was endured after previous failures. We keep hope best we can, but without a solid plan, we are sending the rest of our able-bodied into the abyss."

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: What happened last time?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: "Now, to go into the deep history of this city, as you are outsiders, legend speaks of a seed, that the Sun Tree was placed by Pelor himself to seal a wound in the light. Whitestone rose around it. The fable has long been told, but ever since those fiends took the city, their interest beneath the city has kept me thinking on this fable. Leaves me very unsettled. And as the Sun Tree slowly died, so did our confidence. Further--" At which point, the door across the room opens. (creak) And another enters the room. A very elderly man steps in, his ragged robes draped on his very thin, frail form.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Was your informant by chance named Simon?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "No. Simon has been missing for some time, actually."

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Who was your informant?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "I don't know the name. The information comes through-- actually, he should be arriving here in just a moment."

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: What did they find underneath Whitestone?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "All that we know is they've been rebuilding or repurposing something old and terrible beneath the city. I've only heard whispers of it referred to as the ziggurat."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: The ziggurat.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: "In the castle, yes. There are vents in what was once the garden. I know not the nature of these vents or what is being utilized to produce this foul, noxious odor, but it has put a scent on the city for many years."

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: We act now.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Act now?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Against the Briarwoods?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Count Tylieri.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Here's my plan.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The name Tylieri catches your ear's memory. If you recall, your captive back at Greyskull Keep was previously the owner of the driver of the Briarwoods, Desmond. The one that beat him senseless until eventually Lord Briarwood saw this and then took him as his own driver.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm just a small boy, but we've seen mists at night, strange things that come out when the sun goes down. Are those focused around a central area of town, or are those everywhere?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "The mists are a means of intimidation. It's merely a magical precursor to the undead minions of the Briarwoods. They slink through those mists, use them as cover. If you see it, run."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Thank you.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: We heard about green fog here. Is that something?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: "The few times she's walked the city, it's been procession and power. She seems to enjoy the attention. She's a vain one, that one."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm just a small boy, but we've seen mists at night, strange things that come out when the sun goes down. Are those focused around a central area of town, or are those everywhere?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "The mists are a means of intimidation. It's merely a magical precursor to the undead minions of the Briarwoods. They slink through those mists, use them as cover. If you see it, run."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Thank you.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: We heard about green fog here. Is that something?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "In the castle, yes. There are vents in what was once the garden. I know not the nature of these vents or what is being utilized to produce this foul, noxious odor, but it has put a scent on the city for many years."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Do we know what killed the tree?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "We know not."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: And in your time, do you know anything about Lady Delilah? What she is?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: "She hasn't in almost a year, but she has before, yes. She walks in the sun, unlike her husband."

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "The mists are a means of intimidation. It's merely a magical precursor to the undead minions of the Briarwoods. They slink through those mists, use them as cover. If you see it, run."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Thank you.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: We heard about green fog here. Is that something?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "In the castle, yes. There are vents in what was once the garden. I know not the nature of these vents or what is being utilized to produce this foul, noxious odor, but it has put a scent on the city for many years."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Do we know what killed the tree?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "We know not."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: And in your time, do you know anything about Lady Delilah? What she is?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "The few times she's walked the city, it's been procession and power. She seems to enjoy the attention. She's a vain one, that one."

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Who's this?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Lady Delilah.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Does she come out during the day?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: By this point in the day, it's probably around three in the afternoon.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: But you can also do this from a distance so we can get you far away. You could do both.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I'll start on the distraction.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: And I'm going to give you a second arrow as well.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Of what?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: The arrow?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: It's a question-mark arrow.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: It's an arrow?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. Write down arrow with a question mark. It looks heavily tinkered. It's a little front-loaded with the weight.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: You know what it will do to the roof if it works?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Okay, cool.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: It's a kill-Trinket arrow.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh man, you know what? I forgot I-- okay, cool.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: (laughs) Yes. What?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Just don't. I have thoughts.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Cool, have thoughts. Keep them going.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Arrow?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Arrow?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: All right, can we do something now, please?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: All right. Let's do it.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I'll head over to the other house. Show me on the map where it is so I know where I'm going.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: What time is it?
